args:
set -eu
rg -n 'benchmark_serving_structured_output|responses/serving.py|run_batch.py|anthropic_messages_conversion|benchmarks/serve.py' \
  vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_serving_structured_output.py \
  vllm/vllm/entrypoints/openai/responses/serving.py \
  vllm/vllm/entrypoints/openai/run_batch.py \
  vllm/tests/entrypoints/anthropic/test_anthropic_messages_conversion.py \
  vllm/vllm/benchmarks/serve.py >/dev/null
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/serving.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/trace.measure_prefill_path.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json | jq -e '.outTrace and .summary.mode == "run"' >/dev/null
printf 'shrink-vllm-serving-entrypoints\n'
